get_model_and_input__channels_last_OPT1.detail: model and input converted to channels_last (NHWC)

get_model_and_input__tf32_OPT5_partial.detail: TF32 enabled for matmul and cuDNN

get_model_and_input__bf16_OPT3.detail: model and input cast to bfloat16

pass_fold_bn_into_conv_OPT2.detail: Folded 3 Conv->BN pairs (batch_norm, batch_norm_1, batch_norm_2) using graph-arithmetic (FX ops on existing placeholder nodes)

fixes_applied.issue: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'conv_block' when run_workload.py loaded the file from a different cwd
fixes_applied.fix: Added sys.path guard at module top-level using pathlib.Path(__file__).resolve().parent to always insert the workload directory regardless of working directory

fixes_applied.issue: AssertionError: _w_folded_bn_fold_0 not found in gm._param_name_to_source (AOT Autograd metadata check fails for dynamically-added buffers)
fixes_applied.fix: Replaced register_buffer+get_attr constant injection with graph-arithmetic: BN fold is expressed entirely as FX call_function/call_method ops (torch.add, torch.sqrt, torch.div, torch.mul, torch.neg, reshape) on the existing BN/conv placeholder nodes. No new tensor constants are introduced, so FakeTensorMode and _param_name_to_source remain consistent.

fixes_applied.issue: NameError: name 'suffix' is not defined (stale reference after removing register_buffer block)
fixes_applied.fix: Removed 'suffix' from the logger.info call inside the fold loop
